rows.criterion: No active snapshot's pinned version is ever deleted while still referenced
rows.covered_by: TestGCUnderConcurrency: each long-running reader re-Reads its pinned version after a hold-open window (concurrent writers + compactor running) and asserts no error + byte-exact match against its first read

rows.criterion: Reader's final Read must SUCCEED (file must still exist), not error 'not found'
rows.covered_by: TestGCUnderConcurrency: second Read()'s error is explicitly asserted nil, recorded as a failure (not a silent skip) otherwise

rows.criterion: Content read must match exactly what was true at acquisition (no torn/wrong content)
rows.covered_by: TestGCUnderConcurrency: byte-for-byte comparison between the read taken immediately after NewSnapshot and the read taken after the hold-open window
TestGCUnderConcurrency writer goroutines looping CommitVersion for the shared fileID for the test's duration
TestGCUnderConcurrency compactor goroutine looping RunCompaction back-to-back for the test's duration

rows.criterion: Failures surfaced via shared error-collection mechanism, fail loudly
rows.covered_by: TestGCUnderConcurrency: mutex-guarded failure slice appended to by reader goroutines, asserted empty (t.Fatalf with full contents) after wg.Wait()
go test ./engine/mvcc/... -race -run TestGCUnderConcurrency (self-consistency step); also full package -race run

rows.criterion: No regressions on existing mvcc tests
